creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Kondratyev from comment #4)
OK sorry. I should have noticed this before. But I
just fired up the Mate DE, and the touchpad works
and configures as expected.
hw.usb.usbhid.enable=1 appears to have been the magic
incantation.
Thanks Vladimir! I think we're done here. :-)

--chris
